title: ForgiaCraft X
description: Another modpack inspired by All of Fabric.
body:
ForgiaCraft X is a modpack inspired by [All the Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/atfb).

The goal of the modpack is to provide an experience where people can focus on different things and never get bored, by using QoL mods (optimizations, chest management, etc.) along with bigger mods that can entertain every player, like [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) and its addons, [Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization), [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) and many more.

The modpack includes a custom mod called "[Curse of Worldrot](https://github.com/PietroArsi/curse-of-worldrot)". It's goal is to push players to stay together, collaborate and create infrastructure and expeditions to overcome the increased difficulty.

There are also a lot of mods focusing on fauna and decorations. A custom Patchouli book is also included.

With time, some items may be removed from the modpack, to better balance the bigger mods.

Feel free to suggest improvements!
